com.shanbay.lib.texas.text

类 Paragraph.SpanBuilder

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.shanbay.lib.texas.text.Paragraph.SpanBuilder
  • 封闭类:
    Paragraph

    public static class Paragraph.SpanBuilder
extends java.lang.Object
    span构造器

    • 方法概要

      所有方法 实例方法 具体方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      Paragraph.Builder buildSpan()
      创建新的span
      Paragraph.SpanBuilder next(java.lang.CharSequence text)
      往当前span中添加一段文字
      Paragraph.SpanBuilder next(java.lang.CharSequence text, int start, int end)
      往当前span中添加一段文字
      Paragraph.SpanBuilder setBackground(Appearance background)
      设置当前文字背景

      ColorGround
      Paragraph.SpanBuilder setForeground(Appearance foreground)
      设置当前文字前景

      UnderLine
      Paragraph.SpanBuilder setOnClickedListener(OnClickedListener onClickedListener)
      设置span的点击事件，目前由长按触发
      Paragraph.SpanBuilder setTextStyle(TextStyle textStyle)
      设置当前文字样式

      TextStyle.BOLD TextStyle.BOLD_ITALIC etc
      Paragraph.SpanBuilder tag(java.lang.Object tag)
      设置span tag
